Home About Features

About OrbLayout

OrbLayout is a lightweight static site builder that brings the component-based philosophy of modern frameworks like React and Vue to pure HTML.


No JavaScript runtime. No virtual DOM. No build complexity. Just clean, fast, static HTML — the way the web was meant to be.

How It Works

1. Write .orb files

Use familiar HTML with layout and component syntax.

2. Run orb build

The compiler processes layouts, components, and variables.

3. Get pure HTML

Output is clean static HTML, ready to deploy anywhere.
